note: Itemized audit findings for the fix-audit-findings Workflow. lane ∈ {A,B,C,D}. suggestedEntityId is a best-guess into the vendored oop-excellence glossary; the Resolve phase confirms/corrects it (or sets fix-by-principle when no entity matches). intentionalDesign=true findings get an architect fix-or-document ruling before any change.

lanes.A: wiki-dev-eng-retrieval — src/commands/search, src/cli, src/core/report.ts, src/core/fs.ts, src/core/graph.ts, scripts/lint-vocabulary.sh
lanes.B: wiki-dev-eng-schema — scripts/resolve-vault.sh, src/core/vault.ts, scripts/prompt-guard.sh, scripts/validate-frontmatter.sh, scripts/lint-ontology.sh, scripts/lint-structural.sh, src/commands/verify/check-entity-type.ts, src/core/schema.ts, src/core/firewall.ts, src/data/config/config.ts, package.json
lanes.C: wiki-dev-eng-ingest — src/core/git.ts, src/commands/snapshot/snapshot.ts, scripts/snapshot.sh, scripts/maintenance-run.sh, scripts/obsidian-rename.sh, scripts/sync-source.sh, scripts/session-start.sh, src/core/{staleness,provenance,moc,index-check,manifest}.ts, scripts/verify-ingest.sh, scripts/eval-ingest-extract.sh, scripts/eval-query.sh, scripts/offline-draft.sh, scripts/eval-produce-ollama*.sh, src/commands/heal/heal.ts, agents/claude-wiki-pages-ingest-agent.md (concurrency contract — normally D's file, routed to C as the ingest-concurrency owner; manager serializes)
lanes.D: wiki-dev-eng-ux — tests/engine/*.test.ts, scripts/heartbeat.sh, scripts/validate-docs.sh, docs/ rationale notes

findings.summary: Vault path interpolated unquoted into a `bun -e` JS string → arbitrary Bun code execution via crafted CLAUDE_WIKI_PAGES_VAULT. Fix: pass values via argv/env, not string interpolation.
`printf "$WARNINGS"` uses LLM-influenced content as the format string. Fix: `printf '%s' "$WARNINGS"`.
Bypasses PreToolUse hooks; check_rel is string-glob confinement, not realpath. Rename can escape the vault. Fix: physical-path realpath confinement mirroring protect-raw.sh/firewall.sh.
Guards human prompts only; no semantic barrier on ingested raw/ body content reaching the LLM. Acknowledged in SECURITY.md.
Trusts LLM-written frontmatter as sole signal; structurally-valid frontmatter with harmful body passes. Effectively medium.
Unguarded `>>` append to wiki/log.md can overlap the agent's appendLog and a concurrent cron run. Part of correlation #1 (unified vault lock).
isClean() → appendLog() → commit() is check-then-act; concurrent writer can change log.md between check and commit. Part of correlation #1.
stashUserChanges/checkpoint do isClean→stash/add -A→commit without exclusive access; no timeout on execFileSync. Part of correlation #1 (lock + git timeouts).
bash-fallback git add -A + commit unguarded against concurrent fallback invocations. Part of correlation #1.
Parallel extract fan-out (ADR-0026) has no enforced happens-before between last worker response and first writer Write. Document/enforce the write barrier in the agent contract.
Two snapshot.sh post calls race if sessions overlap; no mechanical single-session guard. Tie to the unified lock.
_page_type() duplicated byte-for-byte across two lint scripts. Extract into a shared sourced helper.
normalize_ws() forked into two divergent implementations of one ADR-0017 spec. Consolidate.
heredoc-Python in command-substitution + 84-line nested BFS vault_cross_log. Flatten / extract.
resolveVault imported by 10/14 command modules; signature change ripples engine-wide. Stabilize the interface / narrow the surface.
Imported by 9/14 commands + 6 core modules; bundles 7 unrelated FS responsibilities. Consider splitting cohesive groups. Wide refactor — architect to scope.
129-line verify-check, no staleness.test.ts; date-coercion/alias branches untested. Add colocated unit suite (TDD).
104-line check, no unit test. Add colocated unit suite.
184 lines, 4 check functions, no unit test. Add colocated unit suite.
79-line check, no unit test. Add colocated unit suite.
eslint@8.57.1 is EOL; @typescript-eslint@8.18.2 already supports v9. Bump to ESLint 9 + flat config. Run gate-11-eslint after.
Finding/Report data-only; logic in free functions. Intentional functional style.
Config passive bag; decisions in free functions. Intentional functional style.
785 lines, 13 public functions. Extract cohesive modules (sourced helpers).
961 lines spanning scoring/artifacts/self-test/CLI. Split responsibilities.
score_candidate ~265 lines. Decompose into focused functions.
4-level nesting in INDEX_CHILDREN extraction. Flatten with early returns/helpers. Watch gate-05 verify-parity.
design-drift check, 4 nesting levels. Flatten. This script IS the glossary gate — keep behavior identical.
4-hop call chain through Python subshells. Simplify.
INDEX_CHILD_INDEXES extracted every scan, never consumed (commented reserved). Remove dead extraction. Watch gate-05.
Ollama curl+backoff block triplicated. Extract a shared sourced helper.
sources: YAML awk extractor duplicated 3× within one file. DRY it. Watch gate-05.
0.90 threshold inline in 3 places. Name a constant.
seed:42 / top_p:1 / num_predict:-1 / temperature:0 raw across 3 scripts. Centralize.
score_candidate 4 positional string params, 8 bare metric locals. Structure the inputs.
wired_read emits name|path|vault|lastSyncedCommit pipe-string; positional parsing scattered across callers.
Imports parseOntologyProfile from peer commands/ontology/; should live in core/. Extract to core/ontology-profile.ts.
Lateral imports of verify and fix commands. Consider mediating via core. Architect to weigh (Mediator opportunity).
104 lines, no unit test. Add colocated unit suite.
checkSchema only via integration. Add colocated unit suite.
command-layer wiring untested. Add a unit/integration test. Keep firewall.ts↔firewall.sh parity (gate-11).
Date-instance dateField branch only via integration. Cover in the new staleness.test.ts (H17).
expect(true).toBe(true) cleanup test. Replace with a real assertion or remove.
Structurally-guaranteed pass. Make the assertion meaningful.
12× `if (!result.ok) return;` silent short-circuits — a parse regression turns these green. Assert result.ok instead of returning.
Fan-out cap [1,8] enforced in config, not at dispatch point; stale/env config could exceed. Enforce at dispatch.
engine.sh backlog called with no timeout; SessionStart can hang. Wrap with timeout.
engine.sh backlog called with no timeout in heartbeat. Wrap with timeout.
post-cooldown filesystem-polling find loop on every session start. Reduce/guard.
git status→git stash with no execFileSync timeout; held index.lock hangs. Add timeouts (folds into H08 unified fix).
Unsanitized path into awk -v; xargs word-splitting of type:. Quote/escape, avoid word-splitting.
dest built from git-derived rel without confinement to $DEST_ROOT. Add realpath confinement.
env-var vault tier returned unnormalized; reads operate on attacker-controlled path. Normalize/confine.
bash-fallback git add -A -- . pathspec-confusion risk (low exploitability). Use explicit scoped pathspec.
Repeated synonymsOf(lexicon, t) reaching into lexicon per field. Decorator opportunity. Architect to weigh.
maxHops ?? 2 ceiling, slice(0,160) — name the literals.
Python heredoc per settings read. Use simpler shell where adequate. (The validate-docs.sh:412 golden-hammer is folded into D's M07 scope to keep one-file-one-lane.)
index/link-suggest capabilities status: planned dispatch to a not-implemented stub. Remove or gate cleanly.
module-level let + beforeAll shared state makes test order matter. Isolate per-test.
.* between groups in grep -E; safe on BSD/GNU NFA, latent on unusual input. Low priority. Routed to B alongside H02/H04 (same file — one-file-one-lane).
